_publications._publicationTitle: Vinblastine/Methotrexate for Debilitating and Progressive Plexiform Neurofibroma in Children and Young Adults with Neurofibromatosis Type 1: A Phase 2 Study.

_contextSnippet: VBL/MTX was well tolerated over multiple cycles. No participants discontinued therapy due to DLTs, and there were no grade 5 AEs. The most common AEs of any grade were hematologic and gastrointestinal
resourceName: National Cancer Institute Common Terminology Criteria for Adverse Events version 4.0
details: Successfully used to assess adverse events in VBL/MTX therapy; no grade 5 AEs observed, most common AEs were hematologic and gastrointestinal, only 1 participant withdrew for grade 1 neuropathy
